summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finnhub market news integration. All backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend displays news correctly with minor loading timing issues.

integration_issues.issue: AI Analysis card may take longer to load due to GPT API call timing

passed_tests: Market News API returns 20 news items from Finnhub
News items display headlines, sources, and timestamps
News items are clickable with external URLs
Footer correctly shows Finnhub as data source
Data source indicator shows 'Sample Data' correctly
Week Overview displays with 5 day cards
